sentences.arabic: ذِكْرُ اللهِ تَعَالَى يَجْعَلُ اللِّسَانَ رَطْبًا وَالْقَلْبَ مُطْمَئِنًّا.
sentences.translation: Spominjanje Allaha čini jezik vlažnim a srce smirenim.
sentences.translationEn: The remembrance of Allah makes the tongue moist and the heart tranquil.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «كَلِمَتَانِ خَفِيفَتَانِ عَلَى اللِّسَانِ، ثَقِيلَتَانِ فِي الْمِيزَانِ: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ، سُبْحَانَ اللهِ الْعَظِيمِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الدَّعَوَاتِ].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, s.a.v.s., je rekao: "Dvije su riječi lahke na jeziku, teške na vagi: Subhanallahi ve bihamdihi, Subhanallahil-Azim" [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o dovama].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: "Two words are light on the tongue, heavy on the scale: Glory and praise be to Allah, Glory be to Allah the Tremendous" [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Supplications].

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الدُّعَاءُ بَسِيطٌ لَكِنَّ أَجْرَهُ عِنْدَ اللهِ كَبِيرٌ.
sentences.translation: Ova dova je jednostavna, ali je nagrada za nju kod Allaha velika.
sentences.translationEn: This supplication is simple, but its reward with Allah is great.

sentences.arabic: يَنْبَغِي لِلْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَذْكُرَ رَبَّهُ فِي كُلِّ وَقْتٍ.
sentences.translation: Musliman treba spominjati svoga Gospodara u svakom trenutku.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim should remember his Lord at all times.
